message:
fix: resolve gosec G104 unhandled rows.Close() error in doctor/perf_dolt.go

Add explicit error suppression (_ = rows.Close()) at line 216 where
rows.Close() return value was unhandled. Matches established pattern
from dependencies.go fix.
